title: Beacon Armor
description: Add Beacon Effects To Your Armor
body:
# Beacon Armor

This mods allows players to give their netherite chestplates beacon effects allowing them to constantly have the effects while wearing them

Features:

- 7 Sets of netherite chestplates all with unique abilities given to the user when worn
 

What to do?

- Craft a Beacon Netherite Chestplate 
- Add whatever potion effect you want (strength, resistance, regeneration, jump boost, speed and haste) to the armor
- Download JEI if needed as recipes may be confusing
 

Future ideas (WIP):

- Actual textures for the special chestplate
- A saturation helmet
